title: Preview · completed task (summary, commit, diff)
summary:
## Done ✅

This is the **DONE** look — the task is finished. The summary leads with the outcome, names the commit and the verification done, and the **Changes** tab carries the full diff for review.

**What shipped:** `python dev.py preview` — one command that installs four phase fixtures, stamps the current `templates/dashboard.html` as each task's `index.html`, and opens the runs hub so you can eyeball the dashboard in every phase at any time.

**Verification:** 183 tests OK (5 skipped); the smoke test asserts every fixture's JSON is valid; lint gate clean.

**Where it lives:** branch `preview/done` — see the **Changes** tab for the diff.

planBlocks.title: 1. Fixtures directory ✅
planBlocks.body: Done. `templates/fixtures/` holds four phase fixtures, committed (since `.workflow/` is gitignored).

planBlocks.title: 2. preview.py harness ✅
planBlocks.body: Done. Copies fixtures, stamps `index.html` from the live template, resolves `baseCommit` for a real diff, opens `/hub`.

planBlocks.title: 4. Smoke test ✅
planBlocks.body: Done. `tests/test_preview_fixtures.py` validates every fixture's JSON and required keys.
